title: Multi-File Workflow With CSV and Excel
summary: Manage analyses across CSV and Excel sources with consistent preview and rule patterns.

content.summary: Manage analyses across CSV and Excel sources with consistent preview and rule patterns.

body.text: Real work spans CSV API dumps and Excel planning sheets. Datilio handles both with the same disciplined workflow. Preview every upload regardless of format. Align column naming where possible so saved rules port between files.

body.caption: Calculator and financial data analysis. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Preview every upload regardless of format. Align column naming where possible so saved rules port between files.
Document which file is system of record vs planning overlay to avoid mixing grains in one chart.

items: Re-export Excel to CSV if sheet structures diverge often.
Apply parallel rules to parallel files for comparisons.
Keep synthetic copies for training on each format.

body.text: Chart each file separately before mentally merging insights. Use Talk to Data within each upload's context—do not assume cross-file joins.
Export filtered subsets from both for finance merges only when definitions match.
Multi-file discipline in Datilio prevents the chaos of ad hoc format switching without preview.

meta_description: Manage analyses across CSV and Excel sources with consistent preview and rule patterns.
